# gigahost_dns_zone (Resource)

Manages a DNS zone on the Gigahost account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a DNS zone (DNS hosting for a domain).
resource "gigahost_dns_zone" "example" {
  zone_name = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_name` (String) Domain name.

### Optional

- `zone_type` (String) Zone type (NATIVE, MASTER, or SLAVE).

### Read-Only

- `external_dns` (Boolean) Whether the zone is served by external nameservers.
- `zone_active` (Boolean) Whether the zone is active.
- `zone_id` (String) Zone id.
- `zone_protected` (Boolean) Whether the zone is protected against deletion.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# DNS zones can be imported by their zone id.
terraform import gigahost_dns_zone.example 123
```
